author: Markiplier
text:
INFINITE ADDICTION = INFINITE MONEY | Scritchy Scratchy
Scritchy Scratchy is a satisfying game about scratch off tickets and the inevitable conclusion that choice leads to! One of the few times I can't stop playing a game start to finish!
